decisions: Approve every compatibility disposition, replacement owner, and gate or role mapping.
Accept DEF-003 through DEF-006 as known v1 limitations without reclassifying them as successful behavior.
Approve the validator-family coverage and v1 maintenance policy.
Retain governance and code validation as mandatory blockers rather than human decisions.
Use an immutable v1 baseline tag in Phase 0C and reserve the final v1 mainline release tag for cutover.

blockers: The exact pull-request head must pass required CI.
The v1 baseline tag and long-lived vnext branch remain Phase 0C actions after feasibility and architecture gates.

failed_runs.root_cause: The repository validation contract used a global pytest that the devcontainer did not install, while the pricing component venv omitted its dev extra and the npm test bypassed that venv.
resolution: Declare and install the root pytest dependency for apex-recall tests.
Install the pricing component with admin and dev extras.
Run pricing tests through the pricing component venv.

failed_runs.root_cause: The devcontainer installed only the root npm dependency tree even though the site has an independent lockfile and build toolchain.
resolution: Install site dependencies from site/package-lock.json during post-create.
Refresh the site dependency tree during post-start.
